test_cases.description: Artifact meets all DoD criteria on first submission
test_cases.input: Brief DoD: '1. Có executive summary ≤1 trang; 2. Số liệu khớp ERP ±1%; 3. Submit trước 15/4'. Artifact contains all three.
test_cases.expected_output: 3/3 criteria MET. Gate verdict: PASS. Handoff to WF-06. SKH-03 signal = 5 (first attempt pass).
test_cases.pass_criteria: Each criterion individually checked with artifact evidence cited. Binary PASS. No partial credit language.

test_cases.input: Same DoD but artifact has: exec summary (✅), numbers match (✅), no submission date evidence (❌).
test_cases.expected_output: 2/3 criteria MET. Gate verdict: FAIL. Specific failed criterion listed: 'Submit trước 15/4 — không tìm thấy evidence về submission date.'
test_cases.pass_criteria: FAIL verdict. NO partial pass. Failed criterion identified with specific reason. Route back specified.
